CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c, "2"), IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXPm&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1560868699000", "" , 30, 30), IF(ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c, "4"), IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXPr&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1560677722000", "" , 30, 30), IF(ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c, "1"), IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXPw&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1560677600000", "" , 30, 30), IF(ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c, "3"), IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXQ1&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1560677837000", "" , 30, 30), IF(ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c, "36"), IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXQ6&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559476346000", "" , 30, 30), IF(ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c, "תיירות מרפא"), IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXQB&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559476681000", "" , 30, 30), IF(ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c, "0"), IMAGE("https://assuta.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXmY&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1565102370000", "" , 30, 30), "")))))))
CustomField.label: Insurance Factor Icon
